---
title: "Consulting"
# listing:
#   contents: 
#     - "posts/*/index.qmd"
#   sort: "date desc"
#   date-format: "YYYY"
#   type: table
#   categories: false
#   fields: [title, date, venue, description]
#   field-display-names:
#     venue: "Venue"
#     date: "Year"
---

Following the completion of my Ph.D. in early 2026, I have started offering independent research, consulting and software development services. I am currently involved in projects and will disclose details where possible in the future. 

If you are looking for advise and technical expertise in any of the following areas, do reach out at [patalt[at]patalt.org](mailto:patalt@patalt.org): 

- **Trustworthy AI** in times of the **EU AI Act**.
- **Trustworthy AI** for finance and economics.
- **Open-source software** solutions for trustworthy AI, in particular **Julia**.
